title: sterculia diversifolia var. occidentalis
intro: Sterculia diversifolia var. occidentalis is a variety of the Sterculia diversifolia plant, commonly known as the West African sterculia or the African sterculia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Sterculia diversifolia var. occidentalis include its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, malaria, and skin infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of this plant include decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which are made by boiling the roots or leaves in water and mixing them with other ingredients to create a medicinal remedy.
